news.title: Tata Steel highlights geopolitical uncertainty adding complexity to businesses.
news.summary: Tata Steel highlights geopolitical uncertainty adding complexity to businesses.

news.title:
Tata Steel highlights geopolitical uncertainty impacting business conditions.
Extended West Asia conflict may affect capex plans and investment timelines.

news.title:
Kush Bohra shares stock picks like Tata Power, Laurus Labs, Apollo Hospitals, with buy/sell calls and targets.
He highlights Tata Steel, Jindal Steel for bullish outlook; cautions sector rotation into financials.
news.summary:

news.title:
JM Financial's Q4 playbook highlights sectors like IT, autos, telecom, and metals as key growth drivers. Preferred stocks include Infosys, Maruti Suzuki, ICICI Bank, Tata Steel, and Bharti Airtel.
Cautious on consumer, pharma, and utilities; stocks like HDFC Bank, Bajaj Finance, and LTIMindtree are marked 'avoid'. Report emphasizes sector-focused stock selection.
news.summary:
JM Financial's Q4 playbook highlights sectors like IT, autos, telecom, and metals as key growth drivers. Preferred stocks include Infosys, Maruti Suzuki, ICICI Bank, Tata Steel, and Bharti Airtel.
Cautious on consumer, pharma, and utilities; stocks like HDFC Bank, Bajaj Finance, and LTIMindtree are marked 'avoid'. Report emphasizes sector-focused stock selection.

news.title:
HSBC retains Buy on Tata Steel with TP ₹250, citing March-April HRC price hikes.
HSBC expects domestic prices to hold, with upside risk supporting valuations.
news.summary:
HSBC retains Buy on Tata Steel with TP ₹250, citing March-April HRC price hikes.

news.title:
Brokerages highlight stock picks like BPCL, GAIL, Tata Steel, SBI Life, and Ambuja Cement across energy, cement, and insurance sectors.
Analysts favor 360One, Nuvama Wealth, Max Healthcare, and domestic cyclicals, citing resilience, market recovery potential, and strategic positioning.
news.summary:

Analysts favor 360One, Nuvama Wealth, Max Healthcare, and domestic cyclicals, citing resilience, market recovery potential, and strategic positioning.

news.title:
Brokerages focus on Titan, DLF, Hindalco, and affordable housing NBFCs, flagging rural demand risks and margin compression.
Top picks include Bharti Airtel, Tata Steel, Home First Finance, and premium consumer plays like Titan and HUL.
news.summary:
Brokerages focus on Titan, DLF, Hindalco, and affordable housing NBFCs, flagging rural demand risks and margin compression.

news.title:
Eternal, Titan, JSW Steel, and Tata Steel are set to post over 50% YoY Q4 profit growth.
MOSL sees Eternal's PAT soaring 432%, Titan's PAT rising 58.7%, and strong numbers for steel firms.
news.summary:
Eternal, Titan, JSW Steel, and Tata Steel are set to post over 50% YoY Q4 profit growth.
MOSL sees Eternal's PAT soaring 432%, Titan's PAT rising 58.7%, and strong numbers for steel firms.

news.title:
Tata Steel India's FY26 crude steel output rose 8% YoY to 23.48 MT.
Domestic deliveries hit 22.53 MT; Thailand sales grew 11% YoY to 1.32 MT.
news.summary:
Tata Steel India's FY26 crude steel output rose 8% YoY to 23.48 MT.
Domestic deliveries hit 22.53 MT; Thailand sales grew 11% YoY to 1.32 MT.

news.title:
Jefferies sees buying opportunity in JSW Steel & Tata Steel due to price divergence.
It expects 30-45% EBITDA growth in FY27E, driven by China demand-supply and rising domestic steel prices.
news.summary:
Jefferies sees buying opportunity in JSW Steel & Tata Steel due to price divergence.
It expects 30-45% EBITDA growth in FY27E, driven by China demand-supply and rising domestic steel prices.

news.title:
Tinplate prices surge as Tata Steel's TCIL and JSW Steel face costly propane gas supplies amid West Asia conflict.
Metal container makers like Amul, Nestle may seek alternatives; MCMA reports 20-25% production impact due to supply issues.
news.summary:
Tinplate prices surge as Tata Steel's TCIL and JSW Steel face costly propane gas supplies amid West Asia conflict.
Metal container makers like Amul, Nestle may seek alternatives; MCMA reports 20-25% production impact due to supply issues.

news.title:
Tata Steel faces Rs 1,755.1 crore mining demand notice; potential financial impact.
Emami to acquire 73.5% stake in Axiom Ayurveda; Shree Cement plans Rs 1,800 crore Meghalaya plant.
news.summary:
Tata Steel faces Rs 1,755.1 crore mining demand notice; potential financial impact.
Emami to acquire 73.5% stake in Axiom Ayurveda; Shree Cement plans Rs 1,800 crore Meghalaya plant.

news.title:
Dharmesh Shah of ICICI Sec recommends buying Tata Steel shares at ₹189-195 with a target of ₹216 and stop loss of ₹179.
Nifty 50 declined 0.5% last week amid global volatility; IT, Metals, and Defense stocks gained, while Pharma and Financials saw profit booking.
news.summary:
Dharmesh Shah of ICICI Sec recommends buying Tata Steel shares at ₹189-195 with a target of ₹216 and stop loss of ₹179.
Nifty 50 declined 0.5% last week amid global volatility; IT, Metals, and Defense stocks gained, while Pharma and Financials saw profit booking.

news.title:
Tata Steel faces a Rs 1,755 Cr demand notice for alleged excess coal mining.
The claim pertains to FY 2000-07 at West Bokaro Colliery; legal contest planned.
news.summary:
Tata Steel faces a Rs 1,755 Cr demand notice for alleged excess coal mining.
The claim pertains to FY 2000-07 at West Bokaro Colliery; legal contest planned.

news.title:
Steelmakers expect strong Q4FY26 earnings due to rising domestic prices, falling imports, and robust demand.
Tata Steel and Jindal Steel may benefit from improved spreads, despite LNG supply risks affecting JSW Steel.
news.summary:
Steelmakers expect strong Q4FY26 earnings due to rising domestic prices, falling imports, and robust demand.

news.title:
Anand Rathi upgrades Tata Steel to 'Buy' with a revised target price of Rs 240.
Tata Steel's EU ops near breakeven; domestic capacity hits 27.35MT; strong price recovery boosts margins.
news.summary:

news.title:
Tata Steel completes acquisition of Medica TS Hospital, now a wholly-owned subsidiary.
Buyout includes 7.4 lakh equity shares and 2.3 crore OCRPS for ₹1.49 crore.
news.summary:
Tata Steel completes acquisition of Medica TS Hospital, now a wholly-owned subsidiary.

news.title:
Odisha seeks Centre's nod to divert 216.9 ha forest land in Keonjhar.
Land diversion is for Tata Steel's exploration of Gandhalapada iron ore block.
news.summary:

news.title:
Tata Steel challenges coal demand notices of ₹385.2 crore for excess Jharia mine production in FY01-FY17.
Ministry of Coal admitted revision applications; no coercive actions during pending revision.
news.summary:
